scripts.lint: corepack pnpm exec eslint eslint.config.mjs && corepack pnpm --filter @timefraim/shared lint && corepack pnpm --filter @timefraim/server lint && corepack pnpm --filter @timefraim/web lint
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @timefraim/shared typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @timefraim/server typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @timefraim/web typecheck
scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @timefraim/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @timefraim/server build && corepack pnpm --filter @timefraim/web build
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @timefraim/shared test && corepack pnpm --filter @timefraim/server test && corepack pnpm --filter @timefraim/web test
scripts.check: corepack pnpm lint && corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm build
